request: Subir archivos test y evidencia del sistema en accion continua mientras el desarrollo sigue en curso.

Tkinter GUI client for CircuitProbe and Prompt Flight
workspace continuity canary projects and runtime evidence
CyberLACE document guard/worker hook adjustments and evidence ledgers

validations.command: python3 -B -m py_compile backend/app.py backend/cyberlace_document_guard.py backend/test_cyberlace_agent_runtime_hooks.py backend/test_continuity_probe.py orchestrator/agent_tools.py orchestrator/continuity_probe.py orchestrator/prompt_flight_probe.py workers/codex_worker.py tools/habla_circuit_probe_tk.py
rg --pcre2 secret-format scan over candidate scope
python3 orchestrator/agent_tools.py prompt-flight --project continuity-probe-canary --mode trace_only --no-harness --prompt "Verificar publicacion continua del sistema en accion desde Codex."

knownBlockers: backups/ not included in this public PR until a dedicated exposure review is done.
The development process is ongoing; future runtime evidence may continue appearing after this commit.
nextStep: Commit and push this continuous-action evidence batch to PR #1, then optionally review backups/ as a separate publish decision.
